mapper.sql: select q.question_id, (select i.default_catalog_id from sc_question_item i where i.source_type = 'LEGACY' and i.source_ref_id = q.question_id order by i.item_id desc limit 1) as catalog_id, q.course_id, q.chapter_id, q.knowledge_point_id, q.question_type, q.difficulty_level, q.stem, q.answer, q.analysis, q.source, q.question_tags, q.material_content, q.source_batch_no, q.quality_score, q.status from sc_question_bank q
mapper.insert: insert into sc_question_bank(course_id, chapter_id, knowledge_point_id, question_type, difficulty_level, stem, answer, analysis, source, question_tags, material_content, source_batch_no, quality_score, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{courseId}, #{chapterId}, #{knowledgePointId}, #{questionType}, #{difficultyLevel}, #{stem}, #{answer}, #{analysis}, #{source}, #{questionTags}, #{materialContent}, #{sourceBatchNo}, #{qualityScore}, #{status}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update: update sc_question_bank course_id = #{courseId},chapter_id = #{chapterId},knowledge_point_id = #{knowledgePointId},question_type = #{questionType},difficulty_level = #{difficultyLevel},stem = #{stem},answer = #{answer},analysis = #{analysis},source = #{source},question_tags = #{questionTags},material_content = #{materialContent},source_batch_no = #{sourceBatchNo},quality_score = #{qualityScore},status = #{status},update_by = #{updateBy},remark = #{remark},update_time = sysdate() where question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.delete: delete from sc_question_bank where question_id in #{questionId}
